⚠️  IMPORTANT: This repository is CLOSED to new pack additions.

If you're submitting a new sound pack, please:
1. Host it in your own GitHub repo
2. Submit it to the registry instead: https://github.com/PeonPing/registry

Community packs are fully supported — there is no difference in functionality.

PRs that fix bugs or improve EXISTING packs are welcome.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for details.
-->

## What does this PR do?

- [ ] Fixes a bug in an existing pack
- [ ] Improves an existing pack (audio quality, manifest, metadata)
- [ ] **Adds a new pack** ⚠️ (will be closed — see CONTRIBUTING.md)
